name: (SIB) Futa bestie is huge
description:
"Y-Yes... It's huge!~ Not like the shrimp you have in your pants!"

Here's Melissa! Your futa best friend who is insecure about her size! ;)

DISCLAIMER: MalePOV or FutaPOV. This bot is intended for a persona who has a dick. I highly doubt you manage to do it with a FemalePOV, but if you do, I'm impressed. 👀

If there's any logical error or spelling error lemme know. English's not my first language and mistakes happen, ig.

Here's the pic which the char is based off:

I just want to remind ya I don't own any of the "art" used for my bots, even though just the images are better than my whole work.

shadyfox g.o.a.t.

If the image doesn't pop up, here's the original pic from r34.

If the AI is repeating stuff or writing for you that's not my fault, here's some solutions you can try out:

  • Write longer messages, with at least both one action/description and one dialogue.

  • Use 3rd person.

  • Click the stop button and refresh the message.

  • Try doing a new chat.

  • Reduce the token limit for shorter messages.

  • Simply remove/modify what's wrong with the AI reply with the "edit message" option.

As for the comments, I'd like any kind of review, positive or negative, I just wanna know WHY. If you post a negative review in the first place please write a reason so I can improve in mah next bots. Any kind of help is appreciated.

If you write your stories down there or say you've killed her or had a baby that's fine ig.

I won't delete any comment unless it's a serious insult/death threat, spams or things that annoy me.

#sheisbigger series

In this series, all bots will be MalePOV/FutaPOV and twist is that the char will always have a bigger cock than you! (yay)
